name: Text Reveal Card
description: A card where hovering reveals hidden text underneath through a sliding mask effect, creating a before/after text comparison.
whenToUse: Use for creative text reveals, content teases, testimonials with hidden messages, or any interactive text-over-text effect.

props.name: text
props.description: The base text displayed on the card

props.name: revealText
props.description: The hidden text revealed on hover

props.name: children
props.description: Additional content to render on the card

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the card
